summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DeezLink boutique - Backend 100% pass (19/19), Frontend mostly working with 1 CRITICAL bug: pack ID mismatch between frontend Offers.js and backend /api/packs

minor.issue: Returns 404 (no root endpoint defined) - expected behavior, not a bug

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Pack IDs mismatch - Frontend uses 'single', 'pack_3', 'pack_5', 'pack_10' but backend /api/packs returns 'solo', 'duo', 'family'. Clicking 'Buy now' redirects to home instead of checkout because Checkout.js can't find matching pack.

integration_issues.issue: Navigation fails due to pack ID mismatch. User clicks 'Buy now' on pack_5 → navigates to /checkout/pack_5 → Checkout.js fetches /api/packs → can't find 'pack_5' (only 'solo', 'duo', 'family' exist) → redirects to home

action_items: CRITICAL FIX: Align pack IDs in Offers.js with backend /api/packs. Change: 'single'→'solo', 'pack_3'→'duo', 'pack_5'→'family'. Or add missing packs to backend.
Consider adding a 4th pack to backend (pack_10/business) to match frontend's 4 packs
critical_code_review_comments: Pack ID mismatch is a data contract violation between frontend and backend - this breaks the core checkout flow
Backend has 3 packs (solo, duo, family) but frontend Offers.js defines 4 packs (single, pack_3, pack_5, pack_10) with different IDs

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All pages load, cart works, mobile responsive works. Only checkout flow broken due to pack ID mismatch

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack ID mismatch is the main issue. Backend packs: solo (1 link, 5€), duo (2 links, 9€), family (5 links, 20€). Frontend Offers.js uses: single, pack_3, pack_5, pack_10. Direct navigation to /checkout/solo works fine. Mobile header, cart panel, gift cards, login all working correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend Offers.js defines pack IDs (single, pack_3, pack_5, pack_10) that don't match backend /api/packs response (solo, duo, family)
reproduction_steps: 2. Click 'Buy now' on any pack (e.g., pack_5)
3. Observe: redirected to home instead of /checkout/pack_5
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update Offers.js pack IDs to match backend: single→solo, pack_3→duo, pack_5→family. Or update backend to add all 4 packs with matching IDs.

features_verified_working: Landing page: Hero, pill, CTAs, album mosaic, stats bar (10,000+, <5 min, 24/7)
Features section: 6 cards with hover effects
Pricing section on home: 3 packs with badges
FAQ accordion: click to expand works
Mobile header: burger menu, logo, cart, lang icon, Sign in hidden
Mobile menu: opens with nav links + Get Started CTA
Offers page: 4 packs displayed with badges (Popular, Best value)
Cart slide panel: add to cart, quantity controls, checkout button
Gift Cards page: amount presets, card preview, Continue button
Footer CTA: visible only on home, hidden on /offers, /gift-cards, /login
No Admin button in center nav
